name: Sansan, Inc.
summary: Sansan, Inc. provides information management services to corporations and individual customers in Japan. The company offers a cloud-based contact management tool with a scanner and tablet set that enables customers to digitize business cards, manage and share contacts, send bulk or individual emails, sync contacts with Salesforce and other third party software tools, add reminders, download database as a CSV file, and send instant internal messages, as well as add tags, notes, and meeting reports to contact's information. It also provides Sansan app for iOS and Android platforms that offers mobile access to Sansan database. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
